offer: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/week, inconsistent timesheet entries cause payroll errors. We notify payroll teams of missing or inconsistent entries instead of manual tracking and reconciliation of timesheets.
problem: Inconsistent timesheet entries lead to payroll errors.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting help
Indie Hackers discussions on payroll solutions

try_it: Let users try weekly timesheet monitoring on 1-3 entries
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Offer early access for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant forums
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
